stemHtml: On June 1st, 2009, an aircraft crashed into the South Atlantic Ocean. The country of registration was France and the country of departure Brazil. When contact was lost, the aircraft was flying over the South Atlantic Ocean in the airspace managed by the Atlantico (Brazil) and Dakar (Senegal) oceanic centres. Which country is responsible for the aircraft accident report?

options.a: The ATS unit which was last in contact with the aircraft.
